description: Pre-written responses to common HN comment types. James monitors and deploys.

responses.how_does_it_work: The stack runs on GitHub Actions (free CI/CD), Anthropic's Claude API for content generation, and Python bots for platform publishing. Full architecture writeup at nyspotlightreport.com/blog/automated-content-operation/
responses.open_source: Not yet public, but working on a packaged version. If you want early access, nyspotlightreport.com/free-plan/ — I'll reach out when it's ready.
responses.quality_concern: Fair question. Claude Sonnet produces content that consistently passes human review. We run every post through SEO checks and publish only if it meets our standard. About 15% get regenerated.
responses.cost_question: Core stack: Claude API ~$1/day, GitHub Actions free tier, Netlify free tier, DigitalOcean VPS $6/month. Optional: Apollo $99/mo, Ahrefs $99/mo, ElevenLabs $22/mo. Total $70-230 depending on which you activate.
responses.skeptical: Fair skepticism. The content is genuinely AI-generated — I'm not claiming it isn't. The value is in the system design and the automation layer. The blog at nyspotlightreport.com shows real output.
responses.interested_in_using: If you want to use it without building it yourself, I offer a done-for-you setup: nyspotlightreport.com/dfy-setup/ or the self-serve SaaS: nyspotlightreport.com/proflow/
